sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54299" key="katakta/men" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατακτάμεν</orth> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-κτάμεναι</orth>, <sense id="n54299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατακτείνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
